profile_backed_hotspot.source: qr_1024x1024_f64 criterion profile and bead frankenjax-fh5q1
profile_backed_hotspot.finding: QR arithmetic candidates repeatedly lost to the scalar reflector path; the residual kept QR hot path included F64 result materialization through per-element Literal allocation.

lever.name: dense_f64_linalg_output_fast_path
lever.description: matrix_to_value now emits F64 linalg results with TensorValue::new_f64_values, avoiding per-element Literal allocation for DType::F64 outputs. F32/F16/BF16 conversion paths are unchanged.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-fh5q1-clean-baseline-776c441d cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- qr_1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 100

after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-fh5q1-dense-f64-output cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- qr_1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 100

rebased_after_confirmation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-fh5q1-rebased-dense-f64-output cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- qr_1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 100

isomorphism_proof.ordering: All QR arithmetic loops, factorization order, tie handling, and branch conditions are unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No floating-point operation is added, removed, reordered, or fused. The change only switches final F64 tensor construction from Vec<Literal> to dense F64 storage.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No random inputs or random state are involved.
isomorphism_proof.dtype_scope: DType::F64 takes the dense constructor; non-F64 dtype conversions still use linalg_literal_from_f64 exactly as before.
isomorphism_proof.observable_value: LiteralBuffer-backed F64 tensors iterate as the same Literal::F64 values, preserving golden-output behavior.

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax qr_ -- --nocapture
validation.result: pass before rebase: 17 passed, 0 failed, 1145 filtered; pass after rebase: 17 passed, 0 failed, 1147 filtered

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax linalg::tests -- --nocapture
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings
validation.result: failed on the candidate and clean base with the same pre-existing linalg.rs lints: two type_complexity lints on complex QR/eig tuple returns and one manual_is_multiple_of lint
